The premise

You have built the career.
Now it is time to build the legacy.

The Table of XII For Her is a private leadership circle for accomplished women who are ready for deeper support, meaningful connection, strategic conversation, and conscious expansion.

Here, the executive is welcome. The visionary is welcome. The woman beneath the title is welcome.

✦

This is a carefully curated circle where wisdom is shared, ideas are cultivated, opportunities are created, and women rise — together.

Why only twelve?

Twelve seats.
One per industry.

The circle is intentionally limited so every woman can be seen, heard, and meaningfully supported. Each seat is curated by industry, experience, and alignment — creating a table where women complement one another instead of competing.

The pillars of the circle

What holds this table

i

Collective Wisdom

Every woman carries intelligence earned through experience. Here it is drawn out, shared freely, and multiplied across the circle.

ii

Conscious Leadership

Leadership that rises from purpose, values, and self-awareness. We develop leaders who influence from the inside out.

iii

Strategic Growth

Visionary solutions to real business challenges. Practical expansion strategies built around your unique position and goals.

iv

Collaboration & Partnership

One industry leader per seat — complementary, never competing. A living ecosystem of skills, networks, and shared opportunity.

v

Emotional Resilience

The capacity to lead through pressure, pivot through uncertainty, and remain grounded when everything around you demands reaction.

vi

Legacy & Impact

Building beyond the quarter. Decisions made today that your industry, your community, and those who come after you will feel for years to come.

Who sits here

She is the woman
who has outgrown
the room she is in.

Accomplished. Respected. Carrying titles that took decades to earn.

And privately — carrying more than most people see. Holding her image together while quietly wondering if there is more to this than the role she performs.

There is. And she already knows it. She is simply looking for the table where it is safe to say so.

She is

A senior executive, founder, or director who leads at the highest level

She feels

Accomplished on the outside — and privately carrying the weight of leadership, visibility, and responsibility

She wants

Elevation. Authentic connection. The support to rise higher without losing herself

She is ready for

A circle of peers who match her altitude — and a space where wisdom, not performance, is the currency

"A table where wisdom is the currency
and every woman rises with the circle."

What awaits you at the table

A complete circle of support

  • iFacilitated wisdom sessions — guided discussions that draw the intelligence of the circle into the room
  • iiTransformational workshops — leadership development, mindset work, and practical business strategy in one space
  • iiiStrategic expansion support — visionary solutions applied to your live business challenges
  • ivCollaboration and partnership — curated connections across industries designed to open doors, not create competition
  • vSpiritual and wellness integration — meditation, mental wellness, and inner alignment as leadership tools, not extras
  • viPersonal advisory access — business and spiritual guidance from Dr. Madelaine Gomes, your host and advisor
  • viiA seat held only for you — one industry per chair, so every woman at the table complements, never competes
Your host & advisor

Dr. Madelaine
Gomes MSc.D

Speaker  ·  Author  ·  Executive Business Mentor  ·  Spiritual Coach

Dr. Madelaine Gomes brings together decades of experience in business, leadership, human development, and personal transformation — sitting at the rare intersection of boardroom strategy and spiritual wisdom.

  • Former Director across HR, Staff Solutions and Business Development
  • Experienced in leading complex teams and advising business leaders
  • Business and leadership advisor for the Harvard Publication Board
  • Doctor of Metaphysical Science, mindset teacher and Pranic Healer
  • Expert in human behaviour with years of experience in human development
  • Creator of the Table of XII and the I AM POSSIBLE breakthrough programs
  • Founder, I AM POSSIBLE & Women Empowerment Guide
  • International Keynote Speaker & Author
  • Advisory Member, Country Advisory Council — Oneness & Wisdom · G100
"I hold space for the woman the world sees — and for the woman she is becoming."
The circle

Built for
visionary women
beyond borders

The Table of XII was created as a meaningful and purposeful international circle where feminine visionary leaders receive support, build meaningful relationships, share wisdom, access practical solutions, and continue growing — personally, professionally, and purposefully — beyond borders.

Women have the power to change what is wrong in the world right now — but only through the right support and collaboration.

Membership includes
✦Two private online gatherings per month, held every second Thursday
✦Access to speakers who inspire and activate greatness
✦Peer wisdom, collaboration and practical business solutions
✦Annual Rise & Shine events around the globe — separate
✦Retreats and transformational workshops — separate
By invitation only. Premium membership. International.
Is this your table?

This circle is for you if...

You are already leading, building, advising, or influencing at a meaningful level.
You want conversation beyond networking — deeper, wiser, more honest, and more useful.
You value both strategy and inner alignment, because the outer work and inner work are connected.
You are ready to contribute wisdom, not only receive support.
You want to belong to a circle where trust, discretion, growth, and collaboration matter.
Request your seat

Apply to the
Wisdom Circle

Applications are read personally by Dr. Madelaine Gomes. We respond to those who are aligned with the circle and the seat available in their industry.

The application process

This is a premium, application-only circle. Your Google application form will be attached here once it is ready.

Step 01Complete the private application form.
Step 02Your application is reviewed for alignment, industry fit, and contribution.
Step 03If aligned, you will be invited to take your seat at the table.
Request My Seat at the Table

Twelve curated seats. One per industry. Premium membership by application only.

POPI Act Compliance

In accordance with the Protection of Personal Information Act 4 of 2013 (POPIA), all personal information submitted through this website is collected for the sole purpose of processing your membership reservation and communicating Circle-related information.

Your information will not be sold, shared, or disclosed to any third party without your explicit consent. You have the right to access, correct, or request the deletion of your personal information at any time by contacting us at spiritscience@madelainegomes.com.

Disclaimer

The Table of XII, facilitated by Dr. Madelaine Gomes MSc.D., is designed for educational, strategic, leadership, and personal development purposes. Results may vary based on individual circumstances and application.

Nothing shared through the Circle constitutes legal, financial, medical, or psychological advice. Members are encouraged to seek qualified professional counsel for matters specific to their individual situation.

Terms & Conditions

All membership fees are payable in advance. Payments made for membership reservations, founding member access, monthly membership, or table participation are non-refundable.

Members are welcome to leave the Table at any time. To avoid future billing, members should communicate their intention to leave before the next membership fee becomes due.
